title: Language Interpretation - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Language Interpretation 8 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASA LATINOS UNIDOS FAMILY EMPOWERMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides wraparound support, transportation, language interpretation, assistance filling out forms (e.g., W-2s, job applications, rental forms, and appointments with other agencies), navigation and enrollment for the Oregon Health Plan, and assistance with documentation of discrimination. 3460 Midvale Drive Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Members of the Latinx community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 512-4949 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASA LATINOS UNIDOS LEBANON OFFICE FAMILY EMPOWERMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides wraparound support, transportation, language interpretation, assistance filling out forms (e.g., W-2s, job applications, rental forms, and appointments with other agencies), navigation and enrollment for the Oregon Health Plan, and assistance with documentation of discrimination. 500 Weldwood Drive Building E Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Members of the Latinx community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 512-4949 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ESCUDO LATINO RESOURCES REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects community members to resources in the area and to bilingual and bicultural staff at other agencies and organizations. 530 C Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on serving the Hispanic/Latin community Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 321-8034 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGE BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides interpretation and translation services. Also provides community center rentals and diversity training. 10301 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 271-6481 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON CHINESE COALITION OCC HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a support line for Chinese community members in crisis situations, including being a victim of a crime, being lost in the streets, receiving an eviction notice, experiencing depression and needing to talk with someone, or needing interpretation services. The support line is for urgent situations only. In most cases, the support will be provided remotely. 219 NW 3rd Avenue #227 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Chinese community members in crisis or urgent situations Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week, though service hours may vary based on volunteer availability Email (503) 334-1010 , Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS LANGUAGE ACCESS AND ACCOMMODATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides language interpretation, including sign language. Offers written materials in other languages and print materials in alternative formats such as braille, real-time captioning (CART), large print, audio, and other formats to access Oregon Department of Human Services (ODHS) programs or services. Cannot answer questions about specific ODHS programs or services. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: People who speak or use a language other than English, people with disabilities, or people who need written materials in alternative formats Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 685-0841 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PUEBLO UNIDO PDX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a navigation team that helps community members overcome financial, technological, linguistic, and literacy barriers to legal representation and social services. Eligibility: Individuals with vulnerable immigration status Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, closed federal holidays Email (503) 912-8925 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOMALI AMERICAN COUNCIL OF OREGON EAST AFRICAN AND SOMALI CULTURALLY SPECIFIC SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy and community services to the African immigrant and refugee community. 12409 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Email (503) 719-7679 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASA LATINOS UNIDOS FAMILY EMPOWERMENT CASA LATINOS UNIDOS FAMILY EMPOWERMENT ESCUDO LATINO RESOURCES REFERRAL IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGE BANK OREGON CHINESE COALITION OCC HOTLINE OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS LANGUAGE ACCESS AND ACCOMMODATIONS SOMALI AMERICAN COUNCIL OF OREGON EAST AFRICAN AND SOMALI CULTURALLY SPECIFIC SERVICES
